description_long: This serving tray features a triangular wooden base with a natural, lightly textured grain. On top of the tray are six small, conical food items in three distinct colors: yellow, green, and pink, arranged in two rows. A small, white ceramic bowl containing a red liquid, likely a dipping sauce, is set into a circular recess on one side of the tray. The tray's surface is flat and smooth, with slightly raised edges to prevent items from sliding off. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible handles or decorative patterns. The tray appears suitable for serving snacks or appetizers in a casual urban setting such as a park or street food stall.
description: A triangular wooden serving tray with six colorful conical snacks and a small white bowl of red sauce, featuring a smooth, natural finish.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the wooden tray, three yellow-green and three pink conical snacks, and a white bowl of red sauce set into a circular recess.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arrangement of snacks in two rows and the bowl positioned at the left edge of the tray.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back row of snacks and the bowl at the far end, with the tray's triangular shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Back-right view focusing on the yellow-green snacks in the foreground and the bowl of sauce on the right side.
attribute_rim_design: Minimal rim, slightly raised edge around the perimeter, flat and unadorned, approximately 1 cm in height and 0.5 cm thick.
attribute_reflective_properties: The wooden tray surface appears matte with low reflectivity, showing no significant glare or highlights. The ceramic bowl has a slightly higher, semi-glossy finish, but overall the object lacks strong reflective properties.
